summary: Frontend re-test after SecureStore->AsyncStorage fix. App now loads cleanly on web preview (no red screen). Convoy branding visible on login. Login with demo@revradar.app/demo1234 redirects to /map. All 5 tabs (Map/Talk/Drive/Music/Garage) reachable. Drive screen redesigned as nav preview is fully rendered with route polyline, top status glass card (time + alerts pill '12'), turn instruction card ('320 m · Turn right onto Market St'), bottom HUD (14 min · 5:42 PM · 9.2 km · 42 mph), 4-button action row (Police/Hazard/Accident/Traffic), and tool row (Sound/Talk/Music/Radar/End). All Drive testIDs (drive-police, drive-hazard, drive-accident, drive-traffic, drive-mute, drive-talk, drive-music, drive-map, drive-end) verified. Map screen renders radar SVG + hazards list + report FAB. Apple liquid-glass aesthetic confirmed (rounded 20-28px cards, system blue gradient buttons, frosted surfaces). Backend not re-tested — already 13/13 in iteration_1.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Expo AV has been deprecated and will be removed in SDK 54. Use expo-audio and expo-video.' — non-blocking, ignored per main agent context.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — minor, used in drive.tsx topBar/alertsStack/bottomWrap.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Migrate expo-av usages to expo-audio/expo-video before SDK 54.
(Optional, non-blocking) Move pointerEvents='box-none' from JSX prop to style.pointerEvents in /app/frontend/app/(app)/drive.tsx (3 occurrences) to silence deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: SecureStore->AsyncStorage swap successfully unblocked web boot. Verified by login screen rendering immediately and successful auth round-trip.
Drive screen at 319 lines is approaching split threshold; consider extracting MapCanvas, TurnCard, BottomHUD into /app/frontend/src/components/drive/* modules if it grows further.
Demo footer on login still says 'demo@revradar.app · demo1234' which is intentional per credentials file; brand mismatch is acknowledged.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login + 5 tabs + Drive nav preview + map all functional)

context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional on web preview. All critical Drive testIDs are in place. Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_rev_radar.py (13 tests) is the regression suite — re-run if backend changes. For frontend regression, use the Playwright flow from this iteration (login → click each tab → verify body text contains tab-specific strings; Drive screen testIDs drive-police/hazard/accident/traffic/mute/talk/music/map/end).
rca_of_issue: Previous iteration was blocked by expo-secure-store@55.0.13 web binding crash. Main agent's fix (replacing expo-secure-store with @react-native-async-storage/async-storage) resolved the boot crash; verified by clean app load, no red screen, and successful JWT login + tab navigation.
